original-actions: Receives the Dungeon Cell Key from a dying knight and escapes imprisonment
Claims an Estus Flask and key from the mortally wounded Oscar of Astora
Defeats the Asylum Demon guarding the only exit from the asylum
Curls into a ball at the cliff's edge, allowing the Giant Crow to carry them to Lordran
Speaks with the Crestfallen Warrior at Firelink Shrine to learn of the Bells of Awakening
Ascends through the Undead Burg, cutting down hollowed soldiers blocking the path
Defeats the Taurus Demon atop the battlements overlooking the bridge
Crosses the Hellkite Dragon's bridge by sprinting through sheets of flame
Kicks down the ladder shortcut connecting the Undead Burg to Firelink Shrine
Fights through the Undead Parish and defeats the armored Berenike Knight
Frees Lautrec of Carim from his cell in the church
Rescues the Fire Keeper's soul from an ambush in Blighttown (or witnesses its theft)
Ascends the bell tower and defeats the Bell Gargoyles in aerial combat
Rings the first Bell of Awakening atop the Undead Parish
Purchases the Basement Key and descends into the Lower Undead Burg
Defeats the Capra Demon and its attack dogs in the cramped arena
Ventures into the Depths and defeats the Gaping Dragon to access Blighttown
Descends through the poison-filled swamps of Blighttown
Confronts and defeats Chaos Witch Quelaag in her domain
Rings the second Bell of Awakening beneath Blighttown
Watches as the gates of Sen's Fortress grind open from Firelink Shrine
Navigates the deadly traps and swinging blades of Sen's Fortress
Defeats the Iron Golem at the fortress summit
Is carried by Batwing Demons over the walls into Anor Londo
Fights through the Silver Knights guarding the city of the gods
Crosses the perilous rafters above the cathedral
Defeats Dragonslayer Ornstein and Executioner Smough in the grand cathedral
Enters the chamber of the Princess of Sunlight
Receives the Lordvessel from Gwynevere, Princess of Sunlight
Warps to Firelink Shrine bearing the vessel of the gods
Descends into the flooded ruins beneath Firelink Shrine
Meets Kingseeker Frampt, the Primordial Serpent who claims to have awaited the Chosen Undead
Listens to Frampt's account of Gwyn's sacrifice and the prophecy of the Chosen Undead
Agrees to succeed Lord Gwyn and perpetuate the Age of Fire
Places the Lordvessel upon the Firelink Altar at Frampt's direction
Learns of the four Lord Souls needed to satiate the Lordvessel
Enters the Duke's Archives through the golden fog gate
Is captured by Seath the Scaleless and imprisoned in the archives
Escapes the prison tower and navigates the deadly crystal archives
Locates and destroys the Primordial Crystal granting Seath immortality
Defeats Seath the Scaleless and claims his Bequeathed Lord Soul Shard
Purchases the Crest of Artorias from Andre the Blacksmith
Enters the sealed forest of Darkroot Garden
Defeats Great Grey Wolf Sif and claims the Covenant of Artorias ring
Obtains the Key to the Seal from Ingward in New Londo Ruins
Drains the flooded ruins by releasing the seal
Equips the Covenant of Artorias and leaps into the Abyss
Defeats the Four Kings and claims their Bequeathed Lord Soul Shard
Descends through the Catacombs and defeats Pinwheel
Navigates the pitch-black Tomb of the Giants using a light source
Defeats Gravelord Nito, First of the Dead, and claims his Lord Soul
Descends through the Demon Ruins past the Firesage Demon and Centipede Demon
Enters the ruins of Lost Izalith, birthplace of demons
Destroys the two glowing roots protecting the Bed of Chaos
Slays the Bed of Chaos, the Witch of Izalith's corrupted form, and claims her Lord Soul
Returns to Firelink Altar and offers the four Lord Souls to the Lordvessel
Watches as the passage to the Kiln of the First Flame opens
Walks the ash-strewn path through the Kiln, defeating five Black Knight sentinels
Enters the chamber of the First Flame and faces Gwyn, Lord of Cinder
Defeats the hollowed god in single combat
Approaches the dying First Flame and chooses to link the fire
Sacrifices their soul to rekindle the First Flame, becoming the new Lord of Cinder
Refuses to immediately place the Lordvessel for Kingseeker Frampt
Seeks another path forward, suspicious of the serpent's true motives
Purchases the Crest of Artorias from Andre the Blacksmith
Enters the sealed forest of Darkroot Garden
Defeats Great Grey Wolf Sif and claims the Covenant of Artorias ring
Obtains the Key to the Seal from Ingward in New Londo Ruins
Drains the flooded ruins by releasing the seal
Equips the Covenant of Artorias and leaps into the Abyss
Defeats the Four Kings and claims their Bequeathed Lord Soul Shard
Meets Darkstalker Kaathe, who rises from the darkness of the Abyss
Listens to Kaathe's revelation about the Furtive Pygmy and the stolen Dark Soul
Learns that Gwyn feared humanity and the Age of Dark that was meant to come
Accepts Kaathe's guidance to become the Dark Lord and usher in the Age of Man
Places the Lordvessel upon the Firelink Altar under Kaathe's direction
Enters the Duke's Archives through the golden fog gate
Is captured by Seath the Scaleless and imprisoned in the archives
Escapes the prison tower and navigates the deadly crystal archives
Locates and destroys the Primordial Crystal granting Seath immortality
Defeats Seath the Scaleless and claims his Bequeathed Lord Soul Shard
Descends through the Catacombs and defeats Pinwheel
Navigates the pitch-black Tomb of the Giants using a light source
Defeats Gravelord Nito, First of the Dead, and claims his Lord Soul
Descends through the Demon Ruins past the Firesage Demon and Centipede Demon
Enters the ruins of Lost Izalith, birthplace of demons
Destroys the two glowing roots protecting the Bed of Chaos
Slays the Bed of Chaos, the Witch of Izalith's corrupted form, and claims her Lord Soul
Returns to Firelink Altar and offers the remaining Lord Souls to the Lordvessel
Watches as the passage to the Kiln of the First Flame opens
Walks the ash-strewn path through the Kiln, defeating five Black Knight sentinels
Enters the chamber of the First Flame and faces Gwyn, Lord of Cinder
Defeats the hollowed god in single combat
Turns away from the dying First Flame and walks out of the Kiln
Is greeted by the Primordial Serpents, who bow before their new sovereign
Becomes the Dark Lord and ushers in the Age of Dark — the Age of Man
